changes.diff:
@@ -6,2 +6,3 @@
 from _pytest._code.code import ExceptionInfo
+from _pytest._code.code import ExceptionChainRepr
 from _pytest._code.code import ReprEntry
@@ -164,23 +165,34 @@
         def disassembled_report(rep):
-            reprtraceback = rep.longrepr.reprtraceback.__dict__.copy()
-            reprcrash = rep.longrepr.reprcrash.__dict__.copy()
+            def serialize_repr_traceback(reprtraceback):
+                reprtraceback = reprtraceback.__dict__.copy()
 
-            new_entries = []
-            for entry in reprtraceback["reprentries"]:
-                entry_data = {
-                    "type": type(entry).__name__,
-                    "data": entry.__dict__.copy(),
-                }
-                for key, value in entry_data["data"].items():
-                    if hasattr(value, "__dict__"):
-                        entry_data["data"][key] = value.__dict__.copy()
-                new_entries.append(entry_data)
+                new_entries = []
+                for entry in reprtraceback["reprentries"]:
+                    entry_data = {
+                        "type": type(entry).__name__,
+                        "data": entry.__dict__.copy(),
+                    }
+                    for key, value in entry_data["data"].items():
+                        if hasattr(value, "__dict__"):
+                            entry_data["data"][key] = value.__dict__.copy()
+                    new_entries.append(entry_data)
 
-            reprtraceback["reprentries"] = new_entries
+                reprtraceback["reprentries"] = new_entries
+                return reprtraceback
 
-            return {
-                "reprcrash": reprcrash,
-                "reprtraceback": reprtraceback,
+            result = {
+                "reprcrash": rep.longrepr.reprcrash.__dict__.copy(),
+                "reprtraceback": serialize_repr_traceback(rep.longrepr.reprtraceback),
                 "sections": rep.longrepr.sections,
             }
+            if isinstance(rep.longrepr, ExceptionChainRepr):
+                result["chain"] = [
+                    {
+                        "reprtraceback": serialize_repr_traceback(reprtraceback),
+                        "reprcrash": reprcrash.__dict__.copy(),
+                        "description": description,
+                    }
+                    for reprtraceback, reprcrash, description in rep.longrepr.chain
+                ]
+            return result
 
@@ -219,39 +231,49 @@
 
-                reprtraceback = reportdict["longrepr"]["reprtraceback"]
-                reprcrash = reportdict["longrepr"]["reprcrash"]
+                def deserialize_repr_traceback(reprtraceback):
+                    unserialized_entries = []
+                    for entry_data in reprtraceback["reprentries"]:
+                        data = entry_data["data"]
+                        entry_type = entry_data["type"]
+                        if entry_type == "ReprEntry":
+                            reprentry = ReprEntry(
+                                lines=data["lines"],
+                                reprfuncargs=ReprFuncArgs(**data["reprfuncargs"])
+                                if data["reprfuncargs"]
+                                else None,
+                                reprlocals=ReprLocals(data["reprlocals"]["lines"])
+                                if data["reprlocals"]
+                                else None,
+                                filelocrepr=ReprFileLocation(**data["reprfileloc"])
+                                if data["reprfileloc"]
+                                else None,
+                                style=data["style"],
+                            )
+                        elif entry_type == "ReprEntryNative":
+                            reprentry = ReprEntryNative(data["lines"])
+                        else:
+                            _report_unserialization_failure(entry_type, cls, reportdict)
+                        unserialized_entries.append(reprentry)
+                    reprtraceback["reprentries"] = unserialized_entries
+                    return ReprTraceback(**reprtraceback)

-                        reprfuncargs = None
-                        reprfileloc = None
-                        reprlocals = None
-                        if data["reprfuncargs"]:
-                            reprfuncargs = ReprFuncArgs(**data["reprfuncargs"])
-                        if data["reprfileloc"]:
-                            reprfileloc = ReprFileLocation(**data["reprfileloc"])
-                        if data["reprlocals"]:
-                            reprlocals = ReprLocals(data["reprlocals"]["lines"])
-
-                        reprentry = ReprEntry(
-                            lines=data["lines"],
-                            reprfuncargs=reprfuncargs,
-                            reprlocals=reprlocals,
-                            filelocrepr=reprfileloc,
-                            style=data["style"],
+                if "chain" in reportdict["longrepr"]:
+                    chain = []
+                    for entry in reportdict["longrepr"]["chain"]:
+                        chain.append(
+                            (
+                                deserialize_repr_traceback(entry["reprtraceback"]),
+                                ReprFileLocation(**entry["reprcrash"]),
+                                entry["description"],
+                            )
                         )

-                        reprentry = ReprEntryNative(data["lines"])
-                    else:

-                    unserialized_entries.append(reprentry)
-                reprtraceback["reprentries"] = unserialized_entries
-
-                exception_info = ReprExceptionInfo(
-                    reprtraceback=ReprTraceback(**reprtraceback),
-                    reprcrash=ReprFileLocation(**reprcrash),
-                )
+                    exception_info = ExceptionChainRepr(chain)
+                else:
+                    exception_info = ReprExceptionInfo(
+                        reprtraceback=deserialize_repr_traceback(
+                            reportdict["longrepr"]["reprtraceback"]
+                        ),
+                        reprcrash=ReprFileLocation(
+                            **reportdict["longrepr"]["reprcrash"]
